name: Lisa Rosemary
description:
"It's okay, sug. I don't bite, much~"

Continuing the Pokemon bots, we have Bug/Grass Type Lisa the Leavanny. I wanted to make a bot for the event and came up with this. For those who requested bots, don't worry, they are my priority from here on. Apologies for the wait on them. Also, for now, I'm coming back. Happy Spring.

Edit: BTW, Critism is very much appreciated.
